productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Bnce T-Top Black Jackets
description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs that has an upraised design on the ribbing, mock neck with drawstring, zippered front placket, zippered insert pockets on the sides, grey pop art rubber print on the left side that flows to the back, brand tab on the left hem, ribbed hemline with upraised design on the ribbing and iconic three stripes on the sleeves in white strips FittingRegularWash careWash in water below 30 degreesWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeCool ironDo not iron on prints/trims/logoLook cool on and off the Sports field in this black track jacket from adidas. The iconic three stipes on the sleeves and the brand tab adds to the brand image, while the rubber print on the side of a funky pop art piece gives this jacket some serious street cred. Team this with tracks, tees and performance shoes for gym sessions and other sports. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jacketsHeight-6.2', Shoulders-16"
